svg.title: Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium — vertical pipeline
svg.desc: Clean vertical flowchart of the SD 3.5 Medium pipeline: text prompts → text encoders → conditioning → latent noise → MMDiT denoising → denoised latent → VAE decoder → output image.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What makes a good text prompt for Stable Diffusion?')
sendPrompt('How does a negative prompt work in SD 3.5?')
sendPrompt('What does CLIP-L encode in Stable Diffusion 3.5?')
sendPrompt('What does T5-XXL do in Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium?')
sendPrompt('What does CLIP-G encode for negative guidance?')
sendPrompt('How are text embeddings merged for SD 3.5 conditioning?')
sendPrompt('What is Gaussian latent noise in diffusion models?')
sendPrompt('How does the MMDiT transformer denoise in SD 3.5 Medium?')
g.text: Joint attention over image + text tokens

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a denoised latent in Stable Diffusion?')
sendPrompt('How does the VAE decoder turn latents into pixels?')
sendPrompt('What resolution does Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium output?')
